scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm_config_cache=.npm-cache sam build --template-file template.yaml
scripts.local:api:warm: npm run build:ts && npm_config_cache=.npm-cache sam build --template-file template.yaml && sam local start-api --template .aws-sam/build/template.yaml --env-vars env.json --warm-containers EAGER
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run secrets:dev && git commit --allow-empty -m "chore: redeploy to sync secrets" && git push
